statement: NVIDIA disclosed heavy customer concentration in Q1 FY2027, with three direct customers representing 21%, 17%, and 16% of total revenue.
why: More than half of revenue coming from three buyers is a structural concentration risk to demand durability.

impact.mechanism: Revenue concentrated in a few hyperscale buyers exposes demand to any single customer pulling back.

evidence.excerpt: For the first quarter of fiscal year 2027, three direct customers represented 21%, 17%, and 16% of total revenue

confidence.basis: Primary NVIDIA 10-Q filing; concentration disclosed verbatim.
